items.name: Cursor
items.doc: A reader that reads from a byte array with a movable position.

members.name: init
members.doc: Creates a cursor that reads from the given data.

members.name: read
members.signature: public mutating func read(into buf: Slice[UInt8]) -> Result[Int64, Error]
members.doc: Reads bytes from the current position.

members.name: setPosition
members.signature: public mutating func setPosition(to pos: Int64)
members.doc: Sets the position, clamping to valid range.

items.name: Empty
items.doc: A reader that always returns EOF immediately.

members.name: read
members.signature: public mutating func read(into buf: Slice[UInt8]) -> Result[Int64, Error]

items.name: Read
items.doc:
Protocol for types that can be read from.

Implementors provide a source of bytes that can be read into a buffer.

members.name: read
members.signature: mutating func read(into buf: Slice[UInt8]) -> Result[Int64, Error
members.doc:
Reads bytes into the buffer.

Returns the number of bytes read, or 0 on EOF.

items.name: Repeat
items.doc: A reader that produces an infinite stream of a single byte.

members.name: init
members.doc: Creates a repeat reader that yields the given byte forever.

members.name: read
members.signature: public mutating func read(into buf: Slice[UInt8]) -> Result[Int64, Error]
members.doc: Fills the entire buffer with the repeated byte.

items.name: readAll
items.signature: public func readAll[R](mutating reader: R, mutating into buf: Array[UInt8]) -> Result[Int64, Error] where R: Read
items.doc:
Reads all bytes from a reader into an array.

Returns the total number of bytes read.

items.name: readByte
items.signature: public func readByte[R](mutating reader: R) -> Result[Optional[UInt8], Error] where R: Read
items.doc:
Reads a single byte from a reader.

Returns None on EOF.

items.name: readExact
items.signature: public func readExact[R](mutating reader: R, into buf: Slice[UInt8]) -> Result[(), Error] where R: Read
items.doc:
Reads exactly count bytes from a reader.

Returns Err if EOF is reached before count bytes are read.
Use when you need a specific number of bytes and a short read is an error.

Example:
    var file = try File.open(path: "header.bin")
    var header = Array[UInt8](repeating: 0, count: 16)
    try readExact(reader: file, into: header.asSlice())  // must read 16 bytes
